description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unity publish that takes a tag name as input and triggers on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and publishing Unity plugins on various platforms including android, ohos, ios, osx, windows, and linux64. Each job should check out the repository, build plugins for different backends, and reset the workspace. The publish job should download artifacts, create a release with the given tag name, and upload the built plugins as release assets.
